rationale: Accepted only the generic SQNT-03G component witness facts. Exact direct, attack-critical, save-half, and save-no-damage projections are replayed through typed component facts and existing Hit Point damage application. No selected attack-spell or level-one damage selected driver is accepted wholesale.

targetBlockedRows.reason: The component evidence makes exact damage facts consumable, but it does not accept battle-runtime-attack-spell-shape-selected-identity.mbt.qnt or battle-runtime-level1-damage-spell-selected-identity.mbt.qnt wholesale; non-damage route, rider, mixed-target, duplicate-face, object/light, and selected catalog-admission facts remain outside this component lane.
